name: vue
text:
ref

const count = ref(0)

console.log(count) // { value: 0 }
console.log(count.value) // 0

count.value++
console.log(count.value) // 1

Typing ref()

import { ref } from 'vue'
import type { Ref } from 'vue'

const year: Ref<string | number> = ref('2020')
year.value = 2020 // ok!

//Or, by passing a generic argument when calling `ref()`
const year = ref<string | number>('2020')
year.value = 2020 // ok!
